description: Canonical mapping from source data through InfoWatchtower news records to company intranet SQL.

source_config.purpose: Defines where data comes from and how it should be fetched.

lineage.path: daily_report_items -> generated_news -> recommendation_items -> dedupe_group_items -> news_items -> raw_items -> data_sources
lineage.rule: Editing and SQL export must preserve foreign keys back to news_items and raw_items.

generated_news_json.notes: sourceUrl and created are forced from the original news item, not trusted from the model.

company_sql.export_scope: Only published/adopted daily report items are exported by default. Candidate-only items and non-adopted retained items stay inside InfoWatchtower unless an admin explicitly creates a special export job.
company_sql.safe_write_pattern: INSERT IGNORE ai_journal first; later tables use INSERT ... SELECT id FROM ai_journal WHERE source_url = :source_url LIMIT 1.

company_sql_templates.ai_journal: INSERT IGNORE INTO ai_journal (source_url, source_title, content, created_at) VALUES (:source_url, :source_title, :raw_content, :created_at);
company_sql_templates.ai_journal_focus: INSERT IGNORE INTO ai_journal_focus (journal_id, focus_id) SELECT id, :focus_id FROM ai_journal WHERE source_url = :source_url LIMIT 1;
company_sql_templates.ai_journal_analysis: INSERT INTO ai_journal_analysis (journal_id, category, title, summary, key_points, content_json, source_url, created_at) SELECT id, :category, :title, :summary, :key_points, :content_json, :source_url, :created_at FROM ai_journal WHERE source_url = :source_url LIMIT 1;
company_sql_templates.t_news_data_info: INSERT INTO t_news_data_info (catalog_id, journal_id, data, adoption_status, category, title, summary, key_points, content_json, source_url) SELECT NULL, id, NULL, :adoption_status, :category, :title, :summary, :key_points, :content_json, :source_url FROM ai_journal WHERE source_url = :source_url LIMIT 1;

export_validation_rules: default export query must start from published daily_report_items joined to generated_news/news_items/raw_items.
only daily_report_items with adoption_status == 2 are exported by the standard daily SQL job.
category must be one of config/taxonomy/news_categories.json categories.
source_url is required and should be checked against the company ai_journal.source_url max length before export.
title, summary, key_points, and content_json are required for ai_journal_analysis and t_news_data_info.
created_at should preserve original published time; do not redistribute dates.
standard daily export writes adoption_status = 2. Non-daily candidates are not exported by default.
